name: Thornwood
description: A dense world of hardwood forest and thorny scrubland where nothing has been planted or tamed. Old oaks tower over endless thickets of barberry and bramble, and every path narrows to a chokepoint. Wild creatures roam through undergrowth so thick it tears skin.
mood: A stubborn, tangled world where everything grabs and nothing gives way. Every step forward costs something.
biome: Dense hardwood forest choked with thorny undergrowth and scrubland
enemies:
FODDER (cost 1-2, swarms):
- Thorn Rat — fast melee flanker, swarms in undergrowth. Small rat with barbed fur.
- Barberry Sprout — ranged chip, shoots tiny thorns. Tiny walking thorn bush on roots.
- Bark Beetle — aerial swarm, bites on contact. Brown hard-shelled flying insect.
- Root Crawler — grapple melee, holds targets in place. Pale centipede hiding in leaf litter.

STANDARD (cost 3-4):
- Briar Hound — pack melee, trips targets on hit. Lean wild dog with matted fur.
- Thornback Boar — charging bruiser, heavy single hits. Wild boar bristling with quills.
- Root Snake — constrictor, immobilizes grabbed prey. Long brown snake coiled in branches.
- Bramble Spider — ranged web, slows enemies from a distance. Large spider in thorn-silk webs.

ELITE (cost 5-6):
- Thicket Cat — stealth assassin, high burst damage from concealment. Large wildcat stalking through thickets.
- Barberry Hedge — damage reflect tank, punishes melee attackers. Enormous thorny bush that moves slowly.
- Old Stag — charging knockback, tramples in a line. Huge buck with massive branching antlers.
- Oak Treant — area control, erupts roots from the ground. Walking old oak tree torn from the earth.

BOSS (cost 7+):
- Briar Bear — heavy melee, wide sweeping swipes. Massive bear tangled in living thorn vines.
- Tall Treant — summoner, root eruptions across the map. Enormous treant, tallest thing in the wood.
- Thorn Mound — area denial, spawns thorn creatures around itself. Colossal walking thorn bush.
- Bull Elk — charging boss, antler cleave and knockback. Enormous elk with heavy branch-like antlers.
items:
- Hatchet (weapon (axe), common): Light chopping blade for close forest fighting.
- Thorn Spear (weapon (spear), common): Spear tipped with a barbed thorn point.
- Oak Club (weapon, common): Stout hardwood bludgeon, simple and heavy.
- Short Bow (weapon (bow), common): Compact bow suited for dense woods.
- Briar Blade (weapon (sword), uncommon): Barbed sword that tears flesh on pull.
- Iron Flail (weapon (flail), uncommon): Heavy chain and iron weight. Hits hard.
- Longbow (weapon (bow), uncommon): Powerful draw, good range through gaps in canopy.
- Oak Maul (weapon (two-handed), rare): Enormous oak war hammer. Slow, devastating.
- Bark Buckler (shield, common): Small shield of layered bark strips.
- Oak Round Shield (shield, uncommon): Sturdy hardwood round shield.
- Briar Vest (accessory, uncommon): Thorny vest that damages attackers on contact.
- Leather Boots (accessory, common): Tough boots for rough thorny terrain.
- Health Potion (consumable, common): Restores a chunk of health.
- Barberry Tonic (consumable, uncommon): Bitter berry brew that boosts attack power.
- Smoke Bomb (consumable, uncommon): Blinds enemies in a thick cloud.
- Salve (consumable, common): Herbal paste that heals poison and bleeding.
